Highlights

A few favorites, before the full list

Built for people who want clarity, not complexity. Here's a taste. Scroll down for everything BudgetBuddy does.

Smart Budget Tracking
Set monthly budgets per category and watch your progress in real time. BudgetBuddy alerts you before you overspend, not after.

Net Worth Tracker
See your assets vs liabilities at a glance. Watch your net worth grow month after month as your habits improve.

Recurring Entries
Set up subscriptions, bills, and salary entries once. BudgetBuddy auto-logs them every cycle, no manual entry needed.
📄
PDF Report Export
Generate polished monthly reports in one tap. Share them with your accountant or keep them for your records.

AI Financial Advisor
Your personal money coach, powered by AI. Get smart tips tailored to your actual spending patterns.
🌙
Beautiful Dark Mode
A stunning dark theme that's easy on the eyes, perfect for checking your finances at night.
Everything inside

The complete feature list

No surprises, no hidden screens. Here's exactly what BudgetBuddy can do for you.

💸
Tracking Your Money
  • Log your spending (expenses) and income
  • Organize spending into categories, like food, rent, and fun, with your own icons and colors
  • Keep track of multiple accounts, like separate cash, bank, and savings
  • Move money between your accounts
  • Save frequent transactions as templates so you don't retype them
  • Set up recurring transactions, like rent or subscriptions, that get added automatically
🎯
Planning & Budgeting
  • Set monthly spending limits for each category
  • Get budget advice and suggestions based on your habits
  • Set savings goals and track your progress toward them
  • Track loans you owe or have given out
  • Get reminders before bills are due
  • See your net worth, everything you own minus everything you owe, with a visual chart
📊
Understanding Your Spending
  • Charts and graphs showing where your money goes
  • A financial health score that rates how well you're managing money
  • A forecast tool that predicts your future spending or balance
  • Monthly report cards summarizing your finances
  • A calendar view showing transactions by day
  • Export your reports as PDF files to save or share
🏆
Fun & Motivation
  • Earn badges and achievements for good money habits
  • Take part in spending challenges
  • Refer friends to the app
  • Get a weekly summary digest of your finances
🔔
Reminders & Alerts
  • Daily reminders to log your expenses
  • Alerts when you're close to or over a budget limit
  • A gentle nudge if you haven't used the app in a while
  • A heads-up when your free trial is about to end
⭐
Premium Features
  • A Premium upgrade screen showing extra features
  • Simple subscription and payment handling to unlock Premium
  • A trial period before you need to pay
🔒
Privacy & Security
  • Lock the app with a PIN or similar security
  • Sign up and create an account
  • Privacy settings you control
  • Option to delete your account and data at any time
  • Choose your preferred currency
📱
Home Screen Widgets
  • A widget showing your balance
  • A widget showing a progress ring, like budget usage
  • A widget showing recent spending
✨
Getting Started & Look/Feel
  • A welcome and onboarding tour for new users
  • Full dark mode support
  • A color picker for customizing categories
  • A built-in way to report bugs to the developer

How it works

Up and running in minutes

No complicated setup. No syncing bank accounts. Just you, your numbers, and a clearer financial picture.

1

Download & Set Up

Install BudgetBuddy from Google Play, create your profile, and set your income and monthly budget goals in under 2 minutes.

2

Log Your Spending

Add transactions as you go, or set up recurring entries so they log themselves. The more you add, the smarter BudgetBuddy gets.

3

Watch Your Money Grow

Follow your budget rings, review your monthly reports, and let the AI advisor guide you toward your financial goals.

FAQ

Questions, answered

Everything people usually ask before downloading a finance app.

Yes. BudgetBuddy doesn't connect to your bank accounts or require any banking credentials. You log entries manually or via templates, so there's no third-party access to your actual accounts. Your data stays on your device and in your secure account, and you can lock the app with a PIN, delete your data, or close your account at any time from Settings. You can read the full details in our privacy policy.

Yes, anytime. Premium is billed through Google Play, so you can cancel directly from your Play Store subscriptions page with no extra steps, no phone calls, and no cancellation fees. You'll keep Premium access until the end of your current billing period.

You can try every feature of BudgetBuddy free for 7 days, no credit card required to get started. If you'd like to keep your Premium features after the trial, you can subscribe to the monthly or yearly plan directly in the app. If you don't, your access simply ends, with no charge and nothing to cancel.

Logging expenses, checking budgets, and reviewing your charts all work fine offline. An internet connection is only needed for cloud backup, restoring data on a new device, and the AI Budget Advisor's suggestions.

You can set your preferred currency in Settings, and every balance, budget, and chart in the app updates to match, whether you're tracking in dollars, rupees, or any other currency.

BudgetBuddy is currently available on Android via Google Play, with an App Store release in development. There's no firm date yet, but you can check back here or reach out by email and we'll let you know when it's live.

Still have a question? Email us at budgetbuddy.budgeting@gmail.com
